name: Gingerbread Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the wet ingredients in a bowl until no lumps of brown sugar remain.
2. In a separate bowl, mix 3 cups all-purpose flour with:
- 4 teaspoons baking soda
- 2 teaspoons cinnamon
- 2 teaspoons ginger
- 1/2 teaspoon cloves
- 1/2 teaspoon allspice
- 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg
3. Add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until well combined.
4. Add an additional 2 cups of flour and stir just until the dough is smooth, avoiding over-stirring.
5. Refrigerate the dough for several hours before rolling out and cutting into cookies.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) until firm enough that you can leave a print with your finger without smearing.
7. Serve warm or at room temperature.
These cookies are delicious either fresh from the oven or enjoyed later as part of a dessert sandwich.
